factory_monthly_limit_usd.description: Operator-approved monthly Factory cap in USD. No default is permitted.

ordinary_run_limit_usd.description: Operator-approved hard cap for one ordinary RSI run in USD. No default is permitted.

ordinary_run_target_usd.description: Operator-approved target for one ordinary RSI run in USD. No default is permitted.

cloud_pool_id.description: Pool id from the approved cloud-slot allocation receipt after backend issue 340 lands.

cloud_environment_kind.description: Daytona environment kind named by the approved cloud-slot allocation and accepted by the hosted launch contract.

first_wake_at.description: Operator-selected first legal wake time after every activation dependency is proved; starts the soak clock without a post-standup patch.

cloud_deployment_id.description: CloudDeployment id whose evidence proves the cloud slot; retained as evidence, not a fabricated Factory binding.

cloud_slot_evidence_ref.description: Absolute file URI plus exact-byte SHA-256 for a synth.rsi_operator_probe_attestation.v1 packet. The operator-attested probe output must be typed JSON captured from backend for subject backend-340-cloud-slot; the portable packet is embedded before persistence.

coordinator_evidence_ref.description: Absolute file URI plus exact-byte SHA-256 for a fresh operator-attested typed probe capture of subject hosted-coordinator from internal-code-factory.

coordinator_mode.description: Typed coordinator durability posture proved by coordinator_evidence_ref.

github_delivery_credential_evidence_ref.description: Digest-bound non-secret operator attestation for PAT mode, or waiver:YYYY-MM-DD:file:/absolute/path#sha256=<digest> for a dated waiver; packet subject is github-delivery-credential and its typed probe output must never contain the raw credential.

m2_contract_sha.description: Exact Internal Code Factory revision that owns the accepted M2 contract.

m2_terminal_receipt_ref.description: Digest-bound evidence packet proving subject m2-terminal-receipt from internal-code-factory.

m2_combined_matrix_evidence_ref.description: Digest-bound evidence packet proving subject m2-combined-matrix from internal-code-factory.

backend_delivery_join_evidence_ref.description: Digest-bound evidence packet proving subject backend-delivery-join from backend.

backend_decision_task_synthesis_evidence.description: Digest-bound evidence packet proving subject decision-task-synthesis from backend.

factorybench_synth_repository_adapter_ev.description: Digest-bound evidence packet proving subject factorybench-synth-repository-adapter from evals and the exact execution contract.

backend_repository_registration_id.description: Typed Code Factory repository registration for backend.

backend_repository_policy_version.description: Probed draft-only Code Factory policy version for backend.

backend_repository_registration_evidence.description: Digest-bound operator-attested capture of a fresh internal-code-factory owner read for subject repository-registration:backend.

synth_ai_repository_registration_id.description: Typed Code Factory repository registration for synth-ai.

synth_ai_repository_policy_version.description: Probed draft-only Code Factory policy version for synth-ai.

synth_ai_repository_registration_evidenc.description: Digest-bound operator-attested capture of a fresh internal-code-factory owner read for subject repository-registration:synth-ai.

evals_repository_registration_id.description: Typed Code Factory repository registration for evals.

evals_repository_policy_version.description: Probed draft-only Code Factory policy version for evals.

evals_repository_registration_evidence_r.description: Digest-bound operator-attested capture of a fresh internal-code-factory owner read for subject repository-registration:evals.

factory.name: synth-rsi
factory.description: Private Synth-on-Synth Research Factory that turns organic maintenance decisions into exact-head draft Deliveries and grades them with FactoryBench.

create_project.name: synth-rsi
create_project.notes: Production RSI project. Resolve only from the approved cloud-slot receipt; laptop slots are not an allowed fallback.

project.description: Canonical workspace for Synth-on-Synth maintenance Deliveries.

cloud_slot_dependency.dependency: backend#340 CloudDeployments substrate and approved cloud-slot allocation
cloud_slot_dependency.binding_rule: Use the typed Project pool id from the cloud-slot receipt. Do not invent Factory cloud-deployment fields or place a deployment id in resource_bindings.
cloud_slot_dependency.fallback: none; local coordinator plus exe.dev is development-only and laptop slots are forbidden

efforts.name: Synth repository FactoryBench improvement
efforts.hypothesis_or_topic: Improve the sealed, held-out FactoryBench score for exact-head candidates produced from organic maintenance decisions against one registered Synth repository: backend, synth-ai, or evals. Each cycle selects one bounded decision, creates one Delivery through the code-factory service, publishes only a draft PR at its exact head, registers a factory_candidate.v1 WorkProduct, grades it against the benchmark-owned baseline, and appends a champion or no_lift event. Preserve originating_run_id, decision_id, delivery_id, code_factory_session_id, the exact delivered head SHA, and evidence artifacts. Automation must never merge; a human alone performs the merge.

actor_notes.maintenance_decision: For one bounded repository change, emit factory_code_change_intent.v1 with the allowed repository_key, docs/config/single_file scope, one exact relative target_path, a bounded objective, and typed acceptance_criteria. Omit the intent for no_op or delegated decisions; prose is never parsed into a task.
actor_notes.delivery: Use the typed Delivery service and its admitted repository revision. Produce an exact-head draft PR only; never mark ready, merge, or bypass repository policy.
actor_notes.grading: Publish a candidate only after delivery evidence is durable. FactoryBench owns held-out inputs, scoring, baseline comparison, and the champion verdict.

invariants: originating_run_id and decision_id match Managed Research authority reads

repository_registration_contract.per_delivery_requirement: admit the exact probed dev head through the typed revision-admission endpoint; do not accept a caller-declared SHA as admission proof

allowed_repositories.required_per_delivery: fresh typed revision_admission_id at the exact base SHA
fresh typed revision_admission_id at the exact base SHA
fresh typed revision_admission_id at the exact base SHA

invariants: git_sha is the immutable 40-character head SHA of the delivered draft PR
git_remote exactly matches one allowed repository registration
entrypoint is a repository-relative regular file accepted by the benchmark-owned repository adapter
parent_candidate_id is null or identifies a candidate from the same repository
artifact_ids include the durable Delivery evidence

requirements.proof: merged evidence reference plus ancestor probe exit 0
merged evidence reference plus ancestor probe exit 0

activation_dependencies.fallback: none; do not substitute laptop slots or untyped metadata bindings

activation_dependencies.accepted_posture: Railway coordinator or explicitly supervised-local interim
